arts.ttl: Everton continue revival with win at Ipswich
arts.sum: Everton's Premier League mini-revival continued on Saturday as they comfortably beat a ragged Ipswich Town 2-0 away to make it four games in a row unbeaten, with the toothless hosts never looking likely to claim their first victory of the season.

arts.ttl: Everton secure first away PL victory of season at winless Ipswich
arts.sum: Everton's autumn resurgence continued as first-half goals from Iliman Ndiaye and Michael Keane secured them a first away win of the season at Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Everton player ratings as Michael Keane brilliant and another excellent in vital win at Ipswich
arts.sum: Everton player ratings and scores after the Premier League clash with Ipswich at Portman Road

arts.ttl: Iliman Ndiaye on target as Everton claim first away victory at winless Ipswich
arts.sum: The visitors were clinical with their finishing at Portman Road.

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town 0-2 Everton: Highlights, man of the match, stats [additional info if space]
arts.sum: First-half goals from Iliman Ndiaye and Michael Keane prove decisive as Everton defeat Ipswich Town 2-0 at Portman Road in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: West Ham star Mohammed Kudus set to miss Everton clash after Tottenham red card
arts.sum: Mohammed Kudus was shown a straight red card for West Ham in their 4-1 defeat to Tottenham at the weekend and the forward is now set to miss the clash with Everton

arts.ttl: Premier League statement on Ipswich penalty after Everton decision overturned
arts.sum: Ipswich Town were denied a penalty kick after referee Michael Oliver was sent to the monitor for a VAR check against Everton

arts.ttl: Why Jarrad Branthwaite is absent as Everton hit by illness
arts.sum: Everton take on Ipswich Town in the Premier League but do so without several key players
